title: Saccolabium walkerianum
taxonomy: Saccolabium walkerianum is a species of orchid, and its classification is as follows: it belongs to the family Orchidaceae, subfamily Epidendroideae, tribe Dendrobieae, subtribe Pseudovanillinae. The genus Saccolabium itself is classified as being part of the tribe Dendrobieae. At the level of order, the plant is classified as Asparagales, and at the level of kingdom it falls under Plantae.
